subject: bridgline holdings guaranty in favor of sequent

emails.subject: FW: Bridgline Holdings Guaranty in favor of Sequent
emails.subject_base: Bridgline Holdings Guaranty in favor of Sequent
emails.body: FW: Bridgline Holdings Guaranty in favor of Sequent Gerald! Attached is Sequents/AGL Resources comments to our guaranty form. Kindly review and if ok with you, please prepare for execution a guaranty in the amount of $6.00MM. Thanks Rudwell 53596.

emails.subject: RE: Bridgline Holdings Guaranty in favor of Sequent
emails.subject_base: Bridgline Holdings Guaranty in favor of Sequent
emails.body: RE: Bridgline Holdings Guaranty in favor of Sequent I am OK with their comments. Who is the correct "Counterparty" for this guaranty?

emails.subject: RE: Bridgline Holdings Guaranty in favor of Sequent
emails.subject_base: Bridgline Holdings Guaranty in favor of Sequent
emails.body: The correct counterparty is Sequent Energy Management, LP. Thanks Rudwell.
